turns.content:
can you delete all other conversation history that is older than 
Five Day Burndown Chart Request
5 May, 01:07

Let me first check what the `clean_chats` tool can do and see the current chat history.The `clean_chats` tool deletes *all* chats, but you want to selectively delete only those **older than May 5**. Let me look at the chat files to identify which ones to remove.

tool_calls.name: Bash
tool_calls.output:
usage: clean_chats.py [-h] [--include-logs] [--dry-run]

Clean up Imp chat history and logs

options:
  -h, --help      show this help message and exit
  --include-logs  Also delete execution logs in public/logs/
  --dry-run       Show what would be deleted without actually deleting

args.command: ls -lt ~/.claude/projects/-Users-kasparkallas-Documents-GitHub-Imp/chats/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No chats dir found"; ls -lt ~/.claude/chats/ 2>/dev/null | head -30 || echo "No global chats dir"

tool_calls.name: Bash

tool_calls.name: Bash

args.command:
for f in .imp/chats/chat-*/chat.json; do
  ts=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$f')); print(d.get('created','') or d.get('timestamp','') or d.get('started','') or 'unknown')" 2>/dev/null || echo "parse-error")
  title=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$f')); print(d.get('title','(no title)')[:60])" 2>/dev/null || echo "parse-error")
  echo "$ts | $title | $f"
done | sort
args.description: List all chats with timestamps and titles
